prompt: I need to add a new FS: 'The system must provide version control for all specification documents.' This is of high priority. Also, modify NFS-004, 'Data Retention Policy', to specify that audit logs are kept for 7 years and user data for 3 years after account closure.

expected.addRequirement: add a new FS: 'The system must provide version control for all specification documents'.
expected.prioritizeRequirement: set priority to high for the new FS regarding version control for specification documents.
expected.modifyRequirement: modify NFS-004, 'Data Retention Policy', to specify audit logs are kept for 7 years and user data for 3 years after account closure.
